question: What is the last date to submit the admission form?
answer: The last date to submit the admission form at SIT Nagpur is 30th June 2025. Late applications are not accepted. Visit the admissions portal at admissions.sitng.ac.in.

question: What is the fee structure for BTech?
answer: The BTech fee at SIT Nagpur is ₹1,20,000 per semester including tuition, library, and lab fees. Fees are payable at the start of each semester.

question: When are the semester exams scheduled?
answer: Semester exams at SIT Nagpur are scheduled from 15th November to 30th November 2025. The detailed schedule is available on the student portal at portal.sitng.ac.in.

question: How do I contact the admissions office?
answer: You can contact the SIT Nagpur admissions office by email at admissions@sitng.ac.in or call +91-712-2223344 between 9AM–5PM on working days.

question: What documents are required for admission?
answer: Documents required for SIT Nagpur admission: 10th & 12th marksheets, transfer certificate, migration certificate, 4 passport-size photos, Aadhaar card, and caste certificate (if applicable).

question: Is there a hostel facility available?
answer: Yes, SIT Nagpur has separate hostels for boys and girls. Hostel fees are ₹60,000 per year including meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner). Apply through the student portal.

question: What is the attendance requirement?
answer: A minimum of 75% attendance is mandatory in each subject at SIT Nagpur. Students below 75% are debarred from appearing in semester exams.

question: How can I apply for a scholarship?
answer: Scholarship applications at SIT Nagpur must be submitted via the student portal before 31st August. Merit scholarships, OBC, SC/ST scholarships are available. Contact the scholarship cell at scholarships@sitng.ac.in.

question: What is the timetable for CS-301?
answer: CS-301 (Data Structures) classes are held Monday, Wednesday, Friday 10AM–11AM in Room 204, CS Block. Check the portal for any updates to the timetable.

question: When is the result of the last semester announced?
answer: Results are announced within 30 days after the last exam on the SIT Nagpur student portal at portal.sitng.ac.in. SMS alerts are sent to registered mobile numbers.

question: What are the library timings at SIT Nagpur?
answer: The SIT Nagpur central library is open Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM. On Sundays, it is open from 10:00 AM to 4:00 PM during exam periods only.

question: What is the hostel fee for a single occupancy room?
answer: Single occupancy hostel rooms at SIT Nagpur are available at ₹80,000 per year including meals. Double sharing rooms are ₹60,000 per year. Deposits of ₹5,000 are refundable.

question: Who do I contact for admission-related queries?
answer: For admission queries: Email admissions@sitng.ac.in, call +91-712-2223344, or visit the admission helpdesk at the main administrative building, SIT Nagpur, Plot No. 44, Pune-Mumbai Bypass Highway, Narhe, Pune.

question: Where can I find the exam schedule or date sheet?
answer: The complete exam date sheet is published on the student portal at portal.sitng.ac.in under 'Examinations'. You will also receive an email notification 15 days before exams begin.

question: What is the scholarship application deadline?
answer: The scholarship application deadline at SIT Nagpur is 31st August for merit scholarships and 15th September for government scholarships (OBC/SC/ST). Applications submitted after the deadline will not be considered.
